description: HTML page implementing a web-based database visualizer with interactive UI elements, dynamic data loading, and client-side scripting for browsing databases, tables, and displaying data in tables.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases and populates the sidebar for selection.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list and resets the interface.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Handles expanding/collapsing database entries and loading tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches tables for a selected database and displays them.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads data for a selected table and displays it in a table format.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Generates HTML for displaying fetched data in tabular form.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Formats individual cell content based on value type for display.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for wide text or objects.
